title: SuSuFeatures
description: A set of features for playing on the SuSuMiners servers
body:
### Features:
- **AutoUpdate Mod** - this mod auto-update on game launch
- **AutoUpdate & Cache RP** - SuSu's server resoursepack (also for other servers if enabled in config) auto-update on game launch/join server & cached for fast join to server
- **Player Name Bar Toggle** - for screenshot or RolePlay [Z]
- **NoClip** - fly through blocks with flying abilities [C]
- **GameMode Switcher** - [F3+F4] unblocked on client side - need Server permissions
- **Auto Panorama Create** - /susufeatures panorama <create/resolution>

### Visual:
- **Mob effects** renderer in GUI 
- **Flag have tootip** that it can be put on your head
- **Dialog's screen features** background blur control & remove empty button

### Most of the features will only be available on SuSu servers
[So as not to change where it is not necessary]
